questions.question: Why is manual red-teaming insufficient for evaluating frontier models?
options: It does not scale; attack success rate needs a statistical sample against a moving target with every model release
Manual prompts are always blocked by filters
Manual testing produces too many false positives
Manual testers cannot read model outputs
questions.question_zh: 为什么手工 red-teaming 不足以评估 frontier 模型？
options_zh: 它无法 scale；attack success rate 需要在每次模型发版时对一个移动靶做有统计意义的采样
手工 prompt 总会被 filter 拦掉
手工测试产生太多 false positive
手工测试者无法读取模型输出

questions.question: What does PAIR stand for, and what does it do?
options: Prompt Automatic Iterative Refinement; an attacker LLM iteratively proposes jailbreaks for a target, with prior attempts as in-context feedback
Pairwise Adversarial Inference Routing; routes attacks across models
Pre-Action Inspection Reasoning; a defensive scaffolding
Persuasive Adversarial Iterative Reward; replaces RM with a persuader
questions.question_zh: PAIR 的全称是什么，它做什么？
options_zh: Prompt Automatic Iterative Refinement；attacker LLM 迭代式地针对目标提出 jailbreak，并把先前尝试作为 in-context feedback
Pairwise Adversarial Inference Routing；在多个模型间路由 attack
Pre-Action Inspection Reasoning；一种防御性脚手架
Persuasive Adversarial Iterative Reward；用 persuader 替换 RM

questions.question: Why is PAIR more efficient than GCG for a black-box target?
options: PAIR uses a larger attacker model than GCG
GCG only attacks open-source models
GCG requires white-box gradient access and produces unreadable suffixes that cannot use in-context feedback; PAIR is black-box and natural-language with in-context learning
PAIR ignores the target's response
questions.question_zh: 为什么对 black-box 目标，PAIR 比 GCG 更高效？
options_zh: PAIR 用比 GCG 更大的 attacker 模型
GCG 只能攻击开源模型
GCG 需要白盒 gradient 访问且产生不可读的 suffix，无法利用 in-context feedback；PAIR 是 black-box 的自然语言形式，并具备 in-context learning
PAIR 忽略 target 的响应

questions.question: Why must Attack Success Rate (ASR) be reported with both a query budget and a judge identity?
options: Because judges always agree
Because budgets are set by JailbreakBench only
Because ASR varies with how many queries the attacker is allowed and with which LLM judges a response as a jailbreak
Because ASR is required by export-control regulations
questions.question_zh: 为什么 Attack Success Rate (ASR) 必须同时报告 query budget 与 judge 身份？
options_zh: 因为不同 judge 总是会一致
因为 budget 只能由 JailbreakBench 决定
因为 ASR 会随 attacker 被允许的 query 数、以及由哪个 LLM 充当 judge 来判断 jailbreak 而变化
因为 ASR 是出口管制法规要求的

questions.question: Which of these automated attacks is best described as 'tree-of-attacks with pruning'?
options: TAP
GCG
PAP
AutoDAN
questions.question_zh: 下列哪种自动攻击最贴近 'tree-of-attacks with pruning' 的描述？
options_zh: TAP
GCG
PAP
AutoDAN

questions.question: Which standardized benchmark uses 510 behaviours across 7 categories with semantic and functional harm tests?
options: JailbreakBench
HarmBench
WMDP
TruthfulQA
questions.question_zh: 哪个标准化 benchmark 在 7 个类别下使用 510 条行为，并兼具 semantic 与 functional harm 测试？
options_zh: JailbreakBench
HarmBench
WMDP
TruthfulQA
